content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is weak today with Nifty -1.24%, IT crashing -5.30%, and VIX spiking +4.36% to 19.40. Book is 67% deployed with net negative unrealized P&L; deployment hysteresis applies — default to NO new entries and focus on position management. FMCG and select PSU bank names are the only pockets of relative strength.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -5.8% but SL at 74.50 still ~3% below CMP of 76.85. Strong Q4 fundamentals (PAT +27%, GNPA 1.45%) support thesis. Let the SL do its work; do not tighten into weakness as it would be a no-op or cause premature exit. Hold current SL 74.50, target 85."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1011.65,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +4.2% with strong Q4 (PAT +18.3%, GNPA <1%). Current SL already at 1011.65 is at breakeven-plus (entry 984). Trailing mandate: P&L>2% so SL must be at least entry — already is. Keeping SL at 1011.65 locks in +2.8% minimum gain. No-op check: current SL is 1011.65, keeping same — this MODIFY is redundant, converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold hedge down -1%. SL at 119 is ~4% below CMP, reasonable for a low-vol ETF. VIX rising supports the hedge thesis even if gold is weak intraday. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1400.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock hit 52-week high 1425 intraday; FMCG defensive bid strong with Nestle Q4 beat (PAT +26%). Entry 1412.94, CMP 1417. Tightening SL from 1395 to 1400 to better reduce risk given stock is at resistance and broader market is weak. Still gives room for a normal pullback. Risk-reward remains favorable toward 1500."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Hit 52-week high 1079.55 intraday then faded to 1054. Entry 1049, CMP 1054. Q4 results tomorrow (April 25) — binary event risk with stock at highs and rich P/E ~30. Tighten SL from 1040 to 1045 (below today's intraday support 1047) to de-risk ahead of earnings. Consider exit or partial booking pre-print in next cycle if momentum stalls."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 672.00,
      "new_target": 725.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Shooting star candle on Apr 22 near 52W high, and Q4 results Apr 29 is binary event risk. Entry 681, CMP 685.80. SL currently at breakeven (681). Tightening to 672 would loosen — rejected. Actually KEEP SL at 681 (breakeven) given binary event; this is a no-op. Converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -2.8% today, giving back some of the Nestle-read-through rally. SL at 2260 is ~2.2% below CMP 2310. Q4 results Apr 30 — let position breathe into the catalyst. Thesis intact (rural recovery, FMCG defensive). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -0.9%, within noise. SL at 393 is ~2% below CMP. Thesis intact: summer peak demand, Q4 results May 15. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 74.50 provides ~3% buffer. Fundamentals strong; wait for either SL trigger or trend reversal."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1011.65 (locks in +2.8% gain). No change needed until stock moves decisively higher toward 1075+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL at 119 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1400.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL to 1400 given stock at 52W high resistance and broader market weakness. Risk-reward still >5:1 to 1500 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL ahead of Apr 25 earnings binary event. Reduces pre-print risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 681 (breakeven) is appropriate pre-earnings Apr 29. Shooting star flags caution."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 2260 reasonable; Q4 Apr 30 is key catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Normal noise; SL at 393 appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "JIOFIN: Weak fundamentals (PAT -14% YoY), P/E ~130, -28% from 52W high — avoid despite Allianz JV narrative. PPLPHARMA/EMCURE/ONESOURCE: pharma defensive momentum noted but no data provided in this batch. DRREDDY: the 5.6x volume on gap-down absorption is intriguing; request again if it persists. OFSS: IT divergence interesting but single-day signal, not actionable yet.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed with 5 of 8 positions at or below breakeven, and today's market is broadly risk-off (Nifty -1.24%, IT -5.30%, VIX +4.36%). Deployment hysteresis applies — no new entries this cycle. Four names have earnings in the next 1-7 trading days (AUBANK Apr 25, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, PNBHOUSING already out). Focus is risk management around these binary events. Cash at INR 3.24L (32%) is a healthy buffer. If multiple earnings surprise negatively, the book is correctly sized to absorb it."
}
